name: Broccoli Cheese Soup (Mcdonald's)
recipeInstructions:
1. Into a blender, add the first six ingredients: water, flour, dry milk powder, chicken bouillon powder, dried minced onion, and black pepper.
2. Blend on high until smooth.
3. Remove larger pieces of broccoli and return them to the blender. Blend those until tiny bits remain.
4. Set aside 3/4 cup of cooking water from the broccoli and discard the rest.
5. Pour the blended mixture into a double boiler over simmering water, stirring until smooth and thickened.
6. Stir in the reserved cooking water and finely diced broccoli.
7. Add the remaining ingredients: sour cream, butter, and cheddar cheese slice.
